ocr_findings.description: Answer key line at bottom of image (問題4-15 ウ  問題4-16 ア  問題4-17 イ  問題4-18 エ) is fully preserved in OCR as '問題4-15 **ウ** 問題4-16 **ア** 問題4-17 **イ** 問題4-18 **エ**' — no loss, fix verified.

reviewer_notes: Page is 出る順！過去問＆完全解説 exam spread with 4 questions (4-15 through 4-18) each with 4-choice ア/イ/ウ/エ options. All question stems, year annotations (平成27年度 etc.), and all choices faithfully reproduced. Answer key line at bottom correctly captured with all 4 answer letters. Page footer '164' in image corresponds to pipeline page_180 offset.
